Recipe.title: Recipe
Recipe.description: Represents a recipe with its ingredients, instructions, and nutritional information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Recipe entity.

protein.description: Total protein (in grams) in the recipe.

carbs.description: Total carbohydrates (in grams) in the recipe.

fat.description: Total fat (in grams) in the recipe.

Ingredient.title: Ingredient
Ingredient.description: Represents an ingredient used in a recipe, including its nutritional information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ingredient entity.

calories.description: Calories per serving of the ingredient.

protein.description: Protein (in grams) per serving of the ingredient.

carbs.description: Carbohydrates (in grams) per serving of the ingredient.

fat.description: Fat (in grams) per serving of the ingredient.

fiber.description: Fiber (in grams) per serving of the ingredient.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who created this ingredient.

MealPlan.title: MealPlan
MealPlan.description: Represents a meal plan for a specific day.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MealPlan entity.

date.description: The date for which the meal plan is created.

totalCalories.description: The meal plan's total calories for the given day.

totalProtein.description: The meal plan's total protein for the given day.

totalCarbs.description: The meal plan's total carbs for the given day.

totalFat.description: The meal plan's total fat for the given day.

definition.description: Recipes owned by a specific user. Path-based ownership for simple security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user who owns the recipe.

definition.description: Ingredients owned by a specific user. Path-based ownership for simple security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user who owns the ingredient.

definition.description: Meal plans owned by a specific user. Path-based ownership for simple security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user who owns the meal plan.

params.name: mealPlanId
params.description: The ID of the meal plan.

definition.description: Pre-defined recipes provided by NutriPlanner. These are read-only for users but can be copied to their personal library.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The ID of the NutriPlanner recipe.

definition.description: A global, shared collection of food ingredients. All users can read and contribute to this collection.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to ensure Authorization Independence, DBAC, and QAPs. User-owned data (Recipes, MealPlans) are stored under `/users/{userId}` for secure, path-based ownership. A global `nutriplanner_recipes` collection holds admin-managed recipes. A new global `ingredients` collection is added to serve as a shared, user-contributed database of food items, readable and writable by all authenticated users to foster a collaborative platform.
